name: Alaskan's Temptation
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 190°C; 375°F, Gas mark 5.
2. Grease a shallow casserole dish.
3. Drain the can of salmon, flake it, and set aside.
4. Arrange one third of potatoes and half of the leeks in the casserole dish.
5. Add half of the salmon, then arrange the remaining potatoes and leeks on top, followed by the rest of the salmon.
6. Sprinkle cheese evenly over the potatoes.
7. Mix the milk, fromage frais, and 1 tablespoon of oil with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Pour the mixture into the casserole dish.
9. Brush the top layer with the remaining oil.
10. Cover and bake for 45 minutes.
11. Remove the cover and continue baking until brown.
12. Serves 6. Approx. 260 calories per serving
